name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 75 is closed out and pushed: the website now has a shared intent-state, telemetry matrix, trust-depth layer, and Vault Network spine across the main public conversion surfaces. The remaining focus is one clean browser verification pass plus deeper user-feedback and form-outcome loops.
nextMilestone: Verify the new Session 75 surfaces in a real browser, ship the micro-feedback engine, and build the release-confidence gate while annual Stripe activation waits on the missing yearly plan keys.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing, so Worker deploys still require local Wrangler auth
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
This environment still does not have one clean browser verification pass for the new Session 75 shared surfaces
